calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Co-Defendant: Louis R. Cortez.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Plaintiff's Witness: Kim Reeder, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Harold Johnson.
Exhibit 1- Lease Agreement------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Fourteen-Day Notice dtd 11-10-05-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Declaration on Proof of Service dtd 12-01-05-------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 47 Dakota St., San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent $369.00
Holdover Damages $2,402.60
Costs $200.00, for a Total of $2,971.60
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Off Calendar
